name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in receiving updates on claim status changes cause missed deadlines. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of claim statuses through emails and phone calls.
